# Freight Bridge LLC
> Bridging Businesses to Their Customers

## NAP
- Name: Freight Bridge LLC
- Address: Iowa City, Iowa City, IA 52245
- Phone: (641) 451-3132
- Email: info@freightbridgellc.com

## Hours
Mon-Fri 8AM-6PM | Sat by appointment | Sun closed

## Domain
https://freightbridgellc.com

## Services
1. Residential & Furniture Moving — Full-service home and apartment moving with careful furniture handling, loading, and transport. From a single piece of furniture to a whole household, our team packs, loads, hauls, and places your belongings — local moves around Iowa City or long-distance moves across state lines.
2. Commercial & Office Moving — Business relocations handled with minimal downtime. We move office furniture, equipment, inventory, and fixtures — coordinating around your schedule so your operation is back up and running fast. Local and interstate commercial moves welcome.
3. Nationwide Freight Hauling — We run our own truck coast to coast, hauling loads in all 50 states. Freight Bridge LLC picks up freight booked through brokers and dispatchers and delivers it safely and on time, nationwide. Reliable capacity, clear communication, and on-time delivery on every lane.
4. Data-Center Hauling — Post-construction debris removal, decommissioned equipment hauling, and site cleanup for data center projects in the Iowa City–Cedar Rapids corridor, including Iowa City, Coralville, North Liberty, and Cedar Rapids.

## Service Areas
- Iowa City, IA
- Coralville, IA
- North Liberty, IA
- Cedar Rapids, IA
- All 50 states (freight hauling)

## Pricing
Contact us for a free, no-obligation quote. Pricing varies by distance, load size, and service type. We offer competitive rates for local moves, long-distance relocations, and nationwide freight lanes.

## Contact Methods
- Phone: (641) 451-3132
- Email: info@freightbridgellc.com
- Website: https://freightbridgellc.com/contact/

## FAQ
- Q: Do you handle long-distance and interstate moves? A: Yes. We handle long-distance moves across state lines, not just local moves around Iowa City.
- Q: Can you move just a few large items instead of a whole house? A: Absolutely. We handle single-item and partial moves — a couch, an appliance, a few rooms of furniture — as well as full-household relocations.
- Q: Where do you haul freight to? A: All 50 states. We run nationwide lanes and go wherever the load needs to go.
- Q: Do you take loads from brokers and dispatchers? A: Yes. We work directly with freight brokers and dispatch services — send us your load details and we'll cover it with our own truck.
- Q: Can you move our office after hours or on weekends? A: Yes. We schedule commercial moves around your business hours to minimize downtime, including evenings and weekends by arrangement.

## Description
Freight Bridge LLC is a trusted moving and freight hauling company based in Iowa City, Iowa. We handle residential and commercial moves, haul freight in 49 states (all except Alaska) for brokers and dispatchers with our own truck, and provide post-construction hauling for data center projects in the Iowa City and Cedar Rapids corridor. Our experienced team is hands-on with every job.

Mohamed Soliman
